about.title: About the studio
about.values_p1: OpenFramework is a collective of developers and creators driven by a shared vision: crafting models, maps and game modes of uncompromising quality. Every project is designed with care, from the smallest detail to the overall experience, to fully immerse players.
about.values_p2: Our goal is simple: deliver unique, high-performance and memorable creations that push the standards and enrich every gaming experience.

devblog.title: DevBlog
devblog.subtitle: Follow the development
devblog.intro: Every month we share our progress, our struggles and our wins. Filter by game to stay up to date.
devblog.empty: No articles yet. Check back soon!

team.title: Join the team
team.subtitle: We’re looking for passionate people to help build living worlds. No office, no constraints — just creation.
team.intro: Browse open positions below. Click on a role to learn more and get in touch.
team.empty: No open positions right now. Check back soon!

core.title: OpenFramework
core.desc: OpenFramework is an immersive DarkRP server on S&Box. Play as a citizen, build your business, form alliances or become law enforcement in a living city where every decision matters.

jobs.title: Join the team
jobs.subtitle: Want to contribute to exciting games on S&Box? We're looking for motivated people.

contact.title: Useful links
contact.subtitle: Our platforms, our code, our community — everything you need to follow the journey.

bugs.empty: No known bugs at the moment. Great news!
bugs.modal_title_placeholder: E.g. Crash when opening the menu
bugs.modal_desc_placeholder: Describe what happens, how to reproduce the bug...
bugs.modal_success: Report sent! Thanks, the team will look into it.
